success_criteria: Have at least the minimum labeled run count required by the judge policy.
Observed spread is narrow enough to justify downstream audits.
caution_criteria: If spread is wide, baseline is still useful but should not anchor small-Delta claims.
failure_criteria: Insufficient labeled runs to establish a stable floor.
promote_rule: Promote only when success criteria are met and no major protocol contamination is detected.
park_rule: Park when interesting signal exists but the current phase or evidence depth is insufficient.
kill_rule: Kill when repeated execution still fails to produce interpretable signal under a valid protocol.
